description: A production supervisor is reviewing the electronic logbook entries made by operators during the previous shift to check for any issues.

nodes.task_description: Open the electronic logbook for the specified production area.
Filter the logbook to show all entries from the last 12 hours.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully filters the log entries.

nodes.task_description: Review the entries and identify a comment about a 'noisy pump' that may require follow-up from maintenance.

expected_outcome.value: Agent reads the logs and flags one entry for follow-up by creating a low-priority maintenance request.
